name: ICICI Bank Sapphiro RuPay Credit Card

specialSpendRules.notes: Utility and insurance spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of Rs 80,000
Utility and insurance spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of Rs 80,000
Person-to-Merchant (P2M) UPI transactions earn reward points at the base domestic rate
Grocery spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of Rs 40,000

joiningBenefits: EaseMyTrip vouchers worth Rs 4,000 (four vouchers of Rs 1,000 each)
Uber vouchers worth Rs 1,000 (four vouchers of Rs 250 each)
milestoneBenefits: Earn 4,000 Reward Points on spending Rs 4 Lakhs in an anniversary year
Earn 2,000 Reward Points for every additional Rs 1 Lakh spent in the same anniversary year
Maximum milestone rewards capped at 20,000 Reward Points (on Rs 12 Lakhs annual spend) per anniversary year
additionalBenefits: Buy one movie or event ticket and get up to Rs 500 off on the second ticket twice every month on BookMyShow, subject to spending Rs 25,000 in the preceding calendar quarter
Up to 4 complimentary golf rounds every month based on eligible spends
RuPay network support for UPI linking with reward point earnings
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank RuPay credit card specifications.
Annual fee of Rs 3,500 is waived on spending Rs 6 Lakhs or more in the previous anniversary year.
Base reward rate is 0.5% (2 points per Rs 100) on domestic spends and UPI transactions.
International spends earn 1.0% (4 points per Rs 100).
Utility and insurance spends earn 0.25% (1 point per Rs 100) and are capped at monthly spends of Rs 80,000.
Complimentary domestic lounge access (4 visits per quarter) requires a minimum spend of Rs 75,000 in the previous calendar quarter.
Complimentary international lounge access (2 visits per calendar year) is provided via Priority Pass or DreamFolks.
Complimentary golf rounds (up to 4 per month) require spending Rs 50,000 per round in the previous calendar month.
